name: Feature request
about: Suggest an engine improvement or new capability
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? What is the use case?

## Proposed solution

What you would like the engine to do.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about, and why this one is preferable.

## Scope check

- [ ] This is an engine capability, not a request to change the bundled sample
      assets (asset customization belongs in a fork — see `CONTRIBUTING.md`).
